meta.description: Canonical tour catalog for redesign agent. Photo IDs reference docs/redesign/04-IMAGE-ASSETS.md — use design placeholders in phase 1, not real files.

site.SITE_DEFAULT_DESCRIPTION: Boat tours and private charters from Split — Blue Cave, islands, and the best of the Adriatic.
site.HOME_PAGE_TITLE: Hello Blue Cave — Split boat tours & private charters

faq.question: Is the Blue Cave ticket included?
faq.answer: Cave entry is often billed separately on-site and depends on sea conditions and official opening hours. We show what's included before you confirm your booking.

faq.question: What if the weather is bad?
faq.answer: We monitor forecasts. Routes may be shortened, reordered, or rescheduled so the day stays safe and enjoyable.

faq.question: Private vs group tours?
faq.answer: Group tours follow a fixed timetable; private charters pick timing and pacing within operational limits — see

link.label: Create your perfect day at sea

faq.question: Where do we meet?
faq.answer: Split's Riva promenade, stand 14. You'll receive the exact meeting time and any last-minute updates after booking.

tours.title: Blue Cave, Hvar & 5 islands
tours.shortDescription: Our flagship island-hopping day — Blue Cave, Vis, Hvar archipelago highlights, and time to swim in hidden bays.
tours.availability: Every day from 1 April to 15 November
itinerary: Departure from Split toward Vis & Biševo area (Blue Cave subject to conditions and optional ticket).
Swim stops and coastal cruising toward Pakleni / Hvar depending on conditions.
Free time or guided time ashore where the schedule allows.
Return along the Split channel with panoramic views.
tours.overviewHighlights: Step aboard our modern speedboat and discover the Adriatic in the most exciting yet comfortable way. Powerful, safe, and expertly handled by our experienced skipper, the boat offers the perfect balance of smooth cruising and dynamic performance. Glide across crystal-clear waters, feel the fresh sea breeze, and enjoy panoramic views of hidden bays and iconic islands. This tour packs the "postcard" islands into one full day — perfect if you want maximum scenery per day ashore.
tours.meetingPoint: Meet at Split's Riva promenade, stand number 14. After booking you'll receive the exact location, map link, and what time to arrive.
tours.weather: We track forecasts and sea state. If conditions are rough or a stop is closed, we adjust the route or timing and communicate changes clearly.
tours.importantInfo: Follow crew instructions, wear a life jacket when asked, stay seated during manoeuvres, and tell us if you have conditions that affect swimming or sun exposure.
included: Snorkelling gear where provided on board
notIncluded: National park / cave entry paid locally when applicable
tours.priceNotes: Indicative: infants 0–3 €0; children 4–10 from €139; adults from €159 — final amount confirmed when you book.
tours.caveTicketNote: Entrance to the Blue Cave may require a separate ticket payable on-site; availability depends on sea conditions and official cave opening hours.
tours.groupSale: Ask about private group blocks for peak weeks — we can hold capacity with a deposit.
disclaimers: Routes, order of stops, and swim breaks may vary with weather, harbour traffic, and site regulations.
National park and cave entry fees may be charged separately on-site where applicable.
